handoff_metadata.handoff_notes: Enhanced v2.0 build with full SLDS compliance and responsive design patterns

steps.design_notes: Warm, brand-aligned greeting with clear order tracking CTA
steps.accessibility_notes: High contrast welcome message with clear focus states

utterances.agent: Hi there! I'm here to help you track your Wolverine order. What can I help you find today?
utterances.user: I need to check my order status

web.agent: Welcome to Wolverine Order Tracking! I can help you find information about your recent order.
web.user: I want to track my order

sms.agent: Hi! I'm your Wolverine assistant. Reply with your order number to track your package.

email.subject: Your Wolverine Order Tracking Assistant
email.body: We're here to help you track your recent Wolverine order. Reply with your order details and we'll provide immediate status updates.

steps.design_notes: Clear form layout with input validation and helpful placeholder text
steps.accessibility_notes: Proper form labels, error states, and input descriptions

utterances.agent: I'll need either your order number or the email address you used for your purchase.

web.agent: Please enter your order number (starts with 'WW-') or your email address:

sms.agent: Please send your order number (format: WW-YYYY-######) or email address.

email.subject: Re: Order Tracking Request
email.body: Please reply with your order number (format: WW-YYYY-######) or the email address used for purchase.

steps.design_notes: Clean order summary card with key details and status indicator
steps.accessibility_notes: Screen reader friendly order details with clear status communication

utterances.agent: Found your order! Here are the details for order WW-2024-789456:

web.agent: Great! I found your order. Here's a summary:

sms.agent: Order WW-2024-789456 found: Wolverine Work Boots, $149.99. Continue for tracking?

email.subject: Order Confirmation - WW-2024-789456
email.body: We've located your order details. Your Wolverine Work Boots order for $149.99 is confirmed in our system.

steps.design_notes: Progressive status indicator with estimated delivery and tracking number
steps.accessibility_notes: Clear progress indicators and timeline accessible to screen readers

utterances.agent: Your order is currently in transit and should arrive by March 25th. Tracking: 1Z999AA1234567890

web.agent: Here's your current order status and tracking information:

sms.agent: Status: In Transit. Delivery: Mar 25. Track: 1Z999AA1234567890. Need anything else?

email.subject: Order Status Update - WW-2024-789456
email.body: Your Wolverine order is in transit! Expected delivery: March 25th. Track with: 1Z999AA1234567890

steps.design_notes: Satisfying conclusion with additional help options and feedback request
steps.accessibility_notes: Clear completion message with accessible follow-up actions

utterances.agent: Glad I could help! Is there anything else you need assistance with today?

web.agent: Perfect! Your order is on its way. Can I help with anything else?

sms.agent: You're all set! Reply HELP for support or STOP to unsubscribe.

email.subject: Order Tracking Complete
email.body: Thanks for using Wolverine Order Tracking! Your order is on its way. Contact us if you need further assistance.

steps.design_notes: Helpful error state with alternative search options
steps.accessibility_notes: Clear error messaging with alternative action paths

utterances.agent: I couldn't find an order with that information. Let me help you try a different way.
utterances.user: Let me try my email address instead

web.agent: We couldn't locate that order. Would you like to try with your email address?
web.user: Yes, let me try my email

sms.agent: Order not found. Try email address or call 1-800-WOLVERINE for help.

email.subject: Order Not Found - Let's Try Another Way
email.body: We couldn't locate an order with that information. Please reply with the email address used for purchase, or contact our support team.

steps.design_notes: Clear explanation of partial fulfillment with remaining item timeline
steps.accessibility_notes: Detailed shipment breakdown accessible to all users

utterances.agent: Your order shipped in multiple packages. Package 1 of 2 is in transit, package 2 will ship tomorrow.
utterances.user: Got it, when will the second package arrive?

web.agent: This order has multiple shipments. Here's the breakdown:
web.user: When will I get the remaining items?

sms.agent: Multiple packages: Package 1 in transit, Package 2 ships tomorrow. Both arrive by Mar 27.

email.subject: Multiple Shipment Update - WW-2024-789456
email.body: Your order is shipping in multiple packages. Package 1 is in transit, Package 2 ships tomorrow. All items will arrive by March 27th.

steps.design_notes: Empathetic greeting acknowledging the product issue
steps.accessibility_notes: Supportive tone accessible across all interaction methods

utterances.agent: I'm sorry to hear you're having an issue with your Wolverine product. I'm here to help make this right.
utterances.user: My boots are falling apart after just two weeks

web.agent: We're sorry you're experiencing issues with your Wolverine product. Let's get this resolved quickly.
web.user: I need to return these defective boots

email.subject: Product Return Assistance - We're Here to Help
email.body: Thank you for contacting Wolverine support. We sincerely apologize for any product quality issues and want to make this right immediately.

steps.design_notes: Structured form to capture issue details with photo upload capability
steps.accessibility_notes: Form fields with clear labels and optional image upload with alt text

utterances.agent: Can you describe what's happening with the boots? Photos would be helpful if you have them.
utterances.user: The sole is separating from the upper after minimal wear

web.agent: Please describe the issue and upload photos if possible:
web.user: The sole is coming apart and there's stitching failure

email.subject: Re: Product Issue Details Needed
email.body: Please describe the specific problem you're experiencing and attach any photos of the defect. This will help us process your return quickly.

messages.text: We're sorry you're experiencing issues with your Wolverine product. Let's get this resolved quickly.
I need to return these defective boots
We're sorry you're experiencing issues with your Wolverine product. Let's get this resolved quickly.
I need to return these defective boots
Please describe the issue and upload photos if possible:
The sole is coming apart and there's stitching failure
